title: BENECREAT 20PCS Clear Party Favour Boxes 8x8x8cm Square PET Gift Boxes with Protective Film for Wedding Souvenir
features: Package Includes: 20pcs clear plastic gift boxes, measures 8x8x8cm/3.15x3.15x3.15", square after assembled; Unfold: 23.5x16x0.1cm
Protective Film: There is a protective film on the surface of the box, which can prevent the box from being scratched during transportation and storage
Premium Material: Made from premium PET plastic, not easy to break or rupture. Recyclable
Easy to Assemble: Original boxes are flat but it easy to assemble, folding along the line is easier and more convenient, no glue required
Wide Usage: Great for wedding souvenirs, party favors/decorations, can store candy, gummy bears, cupcake, chocolate, macaron, etc; Also it’s perfect to decorate with ribbons, labels and flowers
